title: astragalus rotundus
intro: Astragalus rotundus, also known as round milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus rotundus include improving immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of various respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. Astragalus rotundus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
